vibe: Luxury SaaS, Premium Financial Dashboard, Linear/Stripe-inspired

layout_and_spacing.padding_strategy: Generous padding. Cards should use p-6 or p-8. No cramped data.

cards.style: Glassmorphism. bg-[#0B1221]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.premium: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#FBBF24] hover:from-[#FBBF24] hover:to-[#D4AF37] text-black rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-white focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500/50 placeholder:text-slate-500 transition-all outline-none

tables.header: bg-white/5 text-slate-300 font-medium text-sm border-b border-white/10

charts.styling: Use stroke='#2563EB' for revenue lines. Use fill='url(#colorRev)' for gradients. Hide default axis lines, use transparent grids (stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)').

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Every interactive element MUST have a visual hover state (color change + subtle transform like -translate-y-[1px]).
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer Motion. Fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> y: 0) on mount with stagger for grid items.
motion_and_interaction.toast: Use Sonner for minimal, high-contrast dark toast notifications.

brand_logo.description: Premium luxury geometric milk drop logo for Malwa Milk Farm

login_background.description: Cinematic macro shot of milk drop splashing on navy background with gold lighting

dashboard_background.description: Dark mode abstract background with glowing blue and gold glassmorphism elements

farm_atmosphere_1.description: Herd of dairy cattle on field (for marketing or decorative cards)

iconography.style: stroke-width: 1.5, use soft gold or royal blue for active/premium icons, slate-400 for inactive

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and color palette. Avoid generic Bootstrap/Tailwind standard colors, use the specific hex codes provided.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Use Outfit (or similar modern geometric/display sans) for headings and Manrope for body text.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively. Never use dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com.
Implement the Layout's Bento Grid exactly as described for the Dashboard. Ensure full height matching on adjacent cards.
Do NOT build generic Shadcn cards. Customize them with the glassmorphism classes provided in this JSON.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-milk-entry').
For Recharts, customize the tooltips to match the dark glassmorphism theme (bg-[#0B1221], border-white/10).
Ensure the sidebar navigation feels premium, similar to Linear or Stripe. Dark background, subtle active states, not bulky.
Add confirmation modals for 'Delete Entry' and toast notifications for successful additions or payment updates.
